name: Stick Soldier
description: Stick soldier is Arcade game, Hold your finger on screen to make the stick grow. Stretch the stick in order to reach and walk on the platforms. If the stick is not long enough, you will fall down!
instructions: click or touch screen to play
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Arcade, Army, Casual, endless, Game, Games, HTML5, Snow, Stickman
